items.title: Precision Engineering
items.description: Every component is designed to exacting standards, with tolerances measured in microns.

items.title: Cyclone Technology
items.description: Patented multi-cyclone separation captures fine dust and allergens that others miss.

items.title: Long-Run Battery
items.description: Intelligent power management extends runtime without sacrificing suction performance.

items.title: HEPA Filtration
items.description: Captures 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns — expelling cleaner air.

items.title: Smart Connectivity
items.description: Wi-Fi and app-enabled products that learn your habits and adapt automatically.

items.title: Modular Design
items.description: Tools and accessories that click together intuitively, built to outlast the rest.
